sections.title: Consent overlay blocks primary CTA
sections.summary: Homepage loads quickly, but a consent banner initially covers the primary scan CTA until it is dismissed.
steps: Opened the homepage and waited for network quiet.
Observed a consent banner overlaying the hero CTA before dismissal.
Dismissal restored CTA interaction without breaking layout stability.

sections.title: Pricing cards remain stable after route transition
sections.summary: The pricing grid rendered cleanly after navigation from the homepage, with plan CTAs still visible and interactable.
steps: Navigated from the hero CTA to the pricing route.
Pricing cards rendered in a stable grid with no blocking modal.
Primary and secondary package CTAs remained visible above the fold.

sections.title: Report route depends on prior audit hydration
sections.summary: The report shell is reachable, but it still expects a completed audit run before live evidence can populate the page.
steps: Moved from pricing to the report route.
Observed the report chrome loading correctly.
Confirmed that session-backed audit evidence is required for populated runtime content.

sources.title: Homepage before consent dismissal
notes: Hero CTA present behind consent layer.
No fatal console errors appeared on initial load.

sources.title: Pricing route after transition
notes: Pricing cards rendered in a stable grid.
Package CTA buttons remained interactable on desktop viewport.

sources.title: Report route shell
notes: Live evidence requires an audit result in session storage.
